settings.editor.relative_line_numbers.de: Controls how line numbers are shown in the editor gutter. "disabled" shows absolute line numbers, "enabled" shows relative line numbers for each physical line, and "wrapped" shows relative line numbers for each visual line, including wrapped lines.

The cursor shape in visual mode.

Show Edit Predictions in Normal Mode

settings.languages_tools.diagnostics_inc: Whether warnings are shown by default.
settings.languages_tools.diagnostics_max: The severity level used to filter diagnostics shown in the editor.
settings.languages_tools.file_type_assoc: Map languages to the files and extensions that should be handled as that language.
settings.languages_tools.inline_diagnost: Whether diagnostics are shown inline by default.
The minimum column where inline diagnostics are shown.
The space between the end of the source line and the start of inline diagnostics.
Delay before showing inline diagnostics after the last diagnostics update, in milliseconds.
settings.languages_tools.lsp_highlights_: The debounce delay before querying the language server for highlights.
settings.languages_tools.lsp_pull_diagno: The minimum time to wait before pulling diagnostics from the language server.
Whether to pull diagnostics provided by the language server.

settings.search_files.center_on_match.de: Whether to center the current match in the editor.
settings.search_files.close_on_file_dele: Automatically close files that have been deleted.
settings.search_files.file_finder_includ: Use files ignored by git when searching.
settings.search_files.file_icons.descrip: Show file icons in the file finder.
settings.search_files.file_icons.title: File Icons
settings.search_files.file_scan_exclusio: Files or file globs that Zed fully excludes. They are skipped during file scanning and file search, and are not shown in the project file tree. These take priority over File Scan Inclusions.
settings.search_files.file_scan_inclusio: Files or file globs that Zed includes even when they are ignored by git. Use this for files that are not tracked by git but are still important to the project. Broad globs may slow down Zed file scanning. File Scan Exclusions take priority over these inclusion rules.
settings.search_files.page.title: Search & Files
settings.search_files.restore_on_file_re: Restore previous file state when reopening files.
settings.search_files.scan_symlinks.desc: When to scan the contents of linked directories.
settings.search_files.search_include_ign: Include ignored files in search results by default.
settings.search_files.search_regex.title: Regex
settings.search_files.search_wrap.descri: Whether editor search results wrap around.
settings.search_files.search_wrap.title: Wrap Search
settings.search_files.seed_search_query_: When to fill a new search query from the text under the cursor.
settings.search_files.skip_focus_for_act: Whether the file finder should skip the current file in search results.
settings.search_files.use_smartcase_sear: Whether to automatically enable case-sensitive search based on the search query.
